description: VMDistributedZone defines items within a single zone to update.

name.description: Name defines a name of zone, which can be used in zoneCommon spec as %ZONE%

remoteWrite.description: RemoteWrite defines VMAgent remote write settings for given zone

vmagent.description: VMAgent defines VMAgent to balance incoming traffic between VMClusters.

vmcluster.description: VMCluster defines a new inline or referencing existing one VMCluster
